subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of his honour 'Andalíb, upon him be My glory, which was sent unto thee, hath reached [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی نامه جناب عندلیب علیه بهائی که بشما ارسال داشت تلقاء
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
